input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.1.1
            TITLE: the shutdown circuit consists of the following components:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.9.1.1: The Shutdown Circuit consists of the following components:
IC.9.1.1 The Shutdown Circuit consists of the following components:  
a. Primary Master Switch  IC.9.3 
b. Cockpit Main Switch  IC.9.4 
c. (ETC Only) Brake System Plausibility Device (BSPD)  IC.4.8 
d. Brake Overtravel Switch (BOTS)  T.3.3 
e. Inertia Switch (if used)  T.9.4

final_answer: The Shutdown Circuit consists of the following components: a. Primary Master Switch IC.9.3 b. Cockpit Main Switch IC.9.4 c. (ETC Only) Brake System Plausibility Device (BSPD) IC.4.8 d. Brake Overtravel Switch (BOTS) T.3.3 e. Inertia Switch (if used) T.9.4
